title: tylanthus abietinus
intro: Tylanthus abietinus, also known as Labrador tea, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Ericaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in digestion. Tylanthus abietinus can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used to make a tincture or salve for topical application.
